sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['pixels'] >= 10 and node['color'] not in ('B', 'g', 'S'):
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, center=({(min(rows)+max(rows))//2},{(min(cols)+max(cols))//2})")
w_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'w']
print(f"Light gray segments: {len(w_nodes)}")
for n in w_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, center=({(min(rows)+max(rows))//2},{(min(cols)+max(cols))//2})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
